description_long: This object is a stylized shotgun with a wooden brown stock and a blue metallic barrel. The stock is solid and features a slightly contoured grip, with a visible trigger guard and a blue trigger beneath the action. The barrel is relatively short and cylindrical, with a smooth finish and a slight flare at the muzzle. A gold-colored band encircles the barrel near the action, adding a decorative or functional accent. The receiver area is blocky and robust, with a clear demarcation between the wooden and metallic components. The overall design is simple, with minimal surface detailing and a focus on clean, geometric lines.
description: A stylized shotgun with a brown wooden stock and a blue metallic barrel, featuring a gold accent band and a simple, clean design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the brown stock, blue barrel, and gold accent band.
description_view_1: Rear angled view emphasizing the blocky stock and the transition to the barrel, with the trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the blue trigger and gold band more visible.
description_view_3: Front angled view focusing on the open muzzle of the barrel and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no additional reinforcement
